rulings.Case Title: ELITISI SEKONA VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE, INC et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 20, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER WITH DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges causes of action for negligence and UCL violation. Plaintiff's claims are not preempted by HOLA. Pimentel v. Wells Fargo 2015 WL 2184305. = (501/REQ)

PLAINTIFF CLAIRE HACKETT'S Motion For Order To Continue Pending Action By Successor In Interest DENIED without prejudice for Plaintiff to seek appointment of successor in interest as to all claims asserted in the complaint. = (501/REQ)
